offer: For accounting firms processing 10–20 paystubs/month, manual creation causes delays in employee payments. We streamline paystub generation instead of manual paystub creation and email distribution.
problem: Manual creation and distribution of paystubs leads to delays and errors.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Community forums for accounting tools and resources
try_it: Let users try template-based paystub generation for free
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with a CTA
Produce a demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Store common inputs as reusable templates
Set default reminder schedules for users
Allow CSV import for existing paystub data
Simplify onboarding process for new users
